news.t: BlackRock Expands iShares Build ETF Toolkit with Industry's First S&P 500 3%-Capped Weighted ETF

holdings.infoBox: TOPC is an equity ETF with a total of 508 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 3.11%, Broadcom at 3.10%, NVIDIA at 3.07%, Apple at 3.06%, and Microsoft at 2.66%.

overview.description: The iShares S&P 500 3% Capped ETF (TOPC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 3% Capped index, a capped, market-cap-weighted index of 500 large-cap US stocks selected by the S&P Index Committee. TOPC was launched on Apr 15, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Expands iShares Build ETF Toolkit with Industry's First S&P 500 3%-Capped Weighted ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The increasing influence of mega-cap stocks in the U.S. capital market signals the critical need for investors to review their equity exposure to pursue their portfolio goal...
